pi_items.verified_value: Custom-created synthetic project for exception handling training task
pi_items.source: Source code contains explicit 'BUG:' comments indicating intentional bugs; project structure and comments suggest synthetic creation for educational purposes, not sourced from real legacy codebase

privileged_info_summary: legacy-service is a Maven-based Java project containing four intentionally-introduced exception-handling bugs across four classes (RecordParser, EventLogger, ConfigLoader, BatchProcessor). The test suite ExceptionHandlingTest contains exactly 9 test methods verifying the expected behavior after bug fixes. RecordParser swallows NumberFormatException (returns 0L instead of propagating), EventLogger has broad catch(Exception) suppressing NullPointerException, ConfigLoader catches IOException without try-with-resources, and BatchProcessor silently drops corrupt records via broad exception catching. AUDIT_REPORT.md dated 2024-11-28 documents all four findings with required fixes. This is synthetic data created specifically for the task.
